title: SDM Loot
description: A unique loot for each player
body:
# What is SDM Loot?
This mod allows players to divide loot among themselves.

Loot is distributed in such a way that each player gets their own copy of. However, other players can't see someone else's loot.

# How will it be useful?
It happens when the number of mobs on the servers is limited and there are not enough resources for all players, then this mod will allow each of the players to get resources

# Which versions are supported?
At the moment 1.20.1, but in the future we will port it to older versions as well as newer ones
